controllers.mission: Validate every claim against official/recent docs with direct URLs. Fail invented APIs.
Diff artefacts vs fiche/CDC/Docs/OBJECTIVE. Fail on documentation divergence.
Hostile tests; break incomplete work; push edge cases until honest pass or fail-with-path.
Detect skip/poor execution; emit FORCE_CONTINUE with missing checklist.
Final gate: all POINTS pass with evidence; Jerome confirmation list with zero divergence.
